underlying_goal: Set up and configure a complete Neovim development environment with completions, snippets, UI enhancements, and quality-of-life plugins
friction_detail: Telescope transparency changes didn't work and had to be reverted; gitsigns was over-configured with keybinds the user didn't want; user had to interrupt and redirect file placement.
brief_summary: User iteratively built out their Neovim config with completions, snippets, dashboard recent files, git signs, transparency, navigation keybinds, and plugins, mostly successfully with a few missteps on Telescope theming and over-configuration.
